# source: synthetic regression — cursor assistant reply whose hard-wrapped tail lands flush-left
# terminal width 80
user@machine:~/Documents/code/murder $ agent


  Cursor Agent
  v2026.06.04-8f81907
  Use /mcp to connect Cursor to your tools and data sources.


  test


  I will help you fix that bug. This reply is wider than the pane, so the
terminal hard-wraps the overflow onto the next physical row at column zero,
  where cursor does not re-inject its two-space left margin.
